_meta.name: Uniswap V3 Flash Swap — zero-fee flash loans via V3 Pool flash()
_meta.note: V3 pools support flash swaps. Borrow any token, repay in same tx. Fee = pool fee tier (0.01%-1%). Implement uniswapV3FlashCallback() in your contract.

IUniswapV3FlashCallback.description: Implement in YOUR contract — called by pool after flash

Pool_flash_function.description: Call flash() on the V3 POOL to initiate. Pool calls back uniswapV3FlashCallback() on your contract.
